title: Fluent API Builder

statement.markdown:
### Fluent API Builder
Create a fluent API builder that allows you to chain together methods to construct a final object. The API should have methods to set a name, age, and address. Each method should return the API object itself, allowing for method chaining.

### Requirements
The API should have an `of` method that returns the API object.
The API should have a method to set the name, which takes a `name` parameter and returns the API object.
The API should have a method to set the age, which takes an `age` parameter and returns the API object.
The API should have a method to set the address, which takes an `address` parameter and returns the API object.
The API should have a method to get the final object, which returns an object with the name, age, and address properties.

constraints: The API should be implemented using TypeScript.
The API should be a class.
The API should use method chaining to allow for easy construction of the final object.
